name: block/settings-form-page
description: Settings page with profile form inside a two-column settings layout.

meta.name: SettingsFormPage
meta.description: Settings page with profile form inside a two-column settings layout.

props.name: onSave
props.description: Called with valid form values on submit

whenToUse: A settings page with a profile form inside a two-column settings layout
Account or preferences pages with a save action
whenNotToUse: You only need the layout frame — use SettingsLayout
A focused single-field edit — use an inline form
intent.a11yRationale: Form fields are labeled and validation messages are associated for screen readers.
